governingBody: Texas corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PGS 145, 175, 180.
note: The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PGS 145, 175, 180 & 182 SEXUALLY EXPLICIT IMAGES
